name: Italian Chilli
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Zucchini, cut into 1/2-inch pieces (3 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Partly thaw the green beans to separate them.
2. Cook the ground beef, sausage, onion, green pepper, and garlic in a 4-quart Dutch oven over medium heat, stirring often until the beef is browned.
3. Drain excess fat from the pot, then stir in the beans and remaining ingredients except the cheese.
4. Break up the tomatoes and bring the mixture to a boil, stirring frequently.
5. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve hot in bowls, sprinkled with grated Parmesan cheese.
